title: yosys crashes on error output when "logger -expect" is used
body:
I ran `make test` and the tests that use `logger -expect ...` fail, but I guess this only happens for me. Here an example:
```
 Yosys 0.9+3911 (git sha1 f4f471f34, clang 3.4.2 -fPIC -Os)


yosys> logger -expect error oink 1
Added regex 'oink' for warnings to expected error list.

yosys> read_verilog <<EOT
module inverter(input a, output y);
assign y = (a == 1'b0? 1'b1 : 1'b0);
endmodule // inverter
EOT

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: <stdin>
Parsing Verilog input from `<stdin>' to AST representation.
Warning: Yosys has only limited support for tri-state logic at the moment. (<stdin>:2)
<stdin>:2: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected TOK_CONSTVAL
*** Error in `/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys': double free or corruption (!prev): 0x0000000001799c70 ***
======= Backtrace: =========
/lib64/libc.so.6(+0x81329)[0x7f3f535d6329]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys[0x6233b9]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys[0x62329e]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys13log_cmd_errorEPKcz+0x0)[0x623822]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys11cover_extraESsSsb+0x0)[0x624775]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys[0x6233c8]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys14log_file_errorERKSsiPKcz+0xb7)[0x6234cf]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys[0x727625]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_Z24frontend_verilog_yyparsev+0x7a0)[0x70a8fc]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys15VerilogFrontend7executeERPSiSsSt6vectorISsSaISsEEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignE+0x11d9)[0x729cbb]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys8Frontend7executeESt6vectorISsSaISsEEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignE+0xb2)[0x568dac]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys4Pass4callEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignESt6vectorISsSaISsEE+0x1b6)[0x5680fe]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys4Pass4callEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignESs+0x51a)[0x567d80]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(_ZN5Yosys5shellEPNS_5RTLIL6DesignE+0x170)[0x62e327]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys(main+0xb1a)[0x561055]
/lib64/libc.so.6(__libc_start_main+0xf5)[0x7f3f53577555]
/home/michael/projects/yosys/yosys[0x56040d]
```

If I run it with valgrind, this is what I get after entering the last line:
```
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: <stdin>
Parsing Verilog input from `<stdin>' to AST representation.
Warning: Yosys has only limited support for tri-state logic at the moment. (<stdin>:1)
<stdin>:1: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected TOK_CONSTVAL
==23247== Invalid free() / delete / delete[] / realloc()
==23247==    at 0x4C2B06D: free (vg_replace_malloc.c:540)
==23247==    by 0x6233B8: Yosys::logv_error_with_prefix(char const*, char const*, __va_list_tag*) (log.cc:349)
==23247==    by 0x62329D: Yosys::logv_error(char const*, __va_list_tag*) (log.cc:372)
==23247==    by 0x623821: Yosys::log_error(char const*, ...) (log.cc:434)
==23247==    by 0x624774: Yosys::log_check_expected() (log.cc:710)
==23247==    by 0x6233C7: Yosys::logv_error_with_prefix(char const*, char const*, __va_list_tag*) (log.cc:356)
==23247==    by 0x6234CE: Yosys::log_file_error(std::string const&, int, char const*, ...) (log.cc:382)
==23247==    by 0x727624: frontend_verilog_yyerror(char const*, ...) (verilog_frontend.cc:651)
==23247==    by 0x70A8FB: frontend_verilog_yyparse() (verilog_parser.tab.cc:7457)
==23247==    by 0x729CBA: Yosys::VerilogFrontend::execute(std::istream*&, std::string, std::vector<std::string, std::allocator<std::string> >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (verilog_frontend.cc:480)
==23247==    by 0x568DAB: Yosys::Frontend::execute(std::vector<std::string, std::allocator<std::string> >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (register.cc:466)
==23247==    by 0x5680FD: Yosys::Pass::call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::vector<std::string, std::allocator<std::string> >) (register.cc:316)
==23247==  Address 0x6d34840 is 0 bytes inside a block of size 400 free'd
==23247==    at 0x4C2B06D: free (vg_replace_malloc.c:540)
==23247==    by 0x6233B8: Yosys::logv_error_with_prefix(char const*, char const*, __va_list_tag*) (log.cc:349)
==23247==    by 0x6234CE: Yosys::log_file_error(std::string const&, int, char const*, ...) (log.cc:382)
==23247==    by 0x727624: frontend_verilog_yyerror(char const*, ...) (verilog_frontend.cc:651)
==23247==    by 0x70A8FB: frontend_verilog_yyparse() (verilog_parser.tab.cc:7457)
==23247==    by 0x729CBA: Yosys::VerilogFrontend::execute(std::istream*&, std::string, std::vector<std::string, std::allocator<std::string> >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (verilog_frontend.cc:480)
==23247==    by 0x568DAB: Yosys::Frontend::execute(std::vector<std::string, std::allocator<std::string> >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (register.cc:466)
==23247==    by 0x5680FD: Yosys::Pass::call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::vector<std::string, std::allocator<std::string> >) (register.cc:316)
==23247==    by 0x567D7F: Yosys::Pass::call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::string) (register.cc:293)
==23247==    by 0x62E326: Yosys::shell(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (yosys.cc:1252)
==23247==    by 0x561054: main (driver.cc:512)
==23247==  Block was alloc'd at
==23247==    at 0x4C29F73: malloc (vg_replace_malloc.c:309)
==23247==    by 0x5679B28: xmalloc (xmalloc.c:61)
==23247==    by 0x567A08B: add_history (history.c:293)
==23247==    by 0x62E288: Yosys::shell(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (yosys.cc:1239)
==23247==    by 0x561054: main (driver.cc:512)
==23247== 
==23247== 
==23247== HEAP SUMMARY:
==23247==     in use at exit: 824,316 bytes in 3,236 blocks
==23247==   total heap usage: 7,364 allocs, 4,129 frees, 1,117,501 bytes allocated
==23247== 
==23247== 28 bytes in 1 blocks are definitely lost in loss record 395 of 1,928
==23247==    at 0x4C29F73: malloc (vg_replace_malloc.c:309)
==23247==    by 0x5679B28: xmalloc (xmalloc.c:61)
==23247==    by 0x56602FC: readline_internal_teardown (readline.c:501)
==23247==    by 0x56610E1: readline_internal (readline.c:652)
==23247==    by 0x56610E1: readline (readline.c:395)
==23247==    by 0x62E223: Yosys::shell(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) (yosys.cc:1225)
==23247==    by 0x561054: main (driver.cc:512)
==23247== 
==23247== LEAK SUMMARY:
==23247==    definitely lost: 28 bytes in 1 blocks
==23247==    indirectly lost: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
==23247==      possibly lost: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
==23247==    still reachable: 824,288 bytes in 3,235 blocks
==23247==                       of which reachable via heuristic:
==23247==                         stdstring          : 184,275 bytes in 1,413 blocks
==23247==         suppressed: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
==23247== Reachable blocks (those to which a pointer was found) are not shown.
==23247== To see them, rerun with: --leak-check=full --show-leak-kinds=all
==23247== 
==23247== For lists of detected and suppressed errors, rerun with: -s
==23247== ERROR SUMMARY: 4 errors from 4 contexts (suppressed: 0 from 0)
```
